name: Functional - Successful Shift Allowance Calculation
description: Validates the end-to-end workflow for a successful shift allowance calculation given valid SharePoint URL and Excel file path.
input: A POST request to /calculate_shift_allowance with a valid SharePoint URL and Excel file path pointing to a well-formed .xlsx file containing required columns.
output: A JSON response with success=true, containing calculation results and an LLM-generated explanation.
